description: Button Loading State - Add isLoading prop to @op/ui Button that displays a centered spinner while preserving button dimensions

userStories.title: Add isLoading prop with spinner overlay, size scaling, disabled behavior, and ButtonTooltip support
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to pass isLoading to the Button component so that it shows a size-appropriate loading spinner centered over invisible children, disables interaction, and works through ButtonTooltip.
acceptanceCriteria: Button accepts an isLoading boolean prop (default false)
When isLoading is true, button children are rendered with visibility: hidden so they still occupy space
A LoadingSpinner (from @op/ui/LoadingSpinner) is absolutely positioned and centered over the hidden children
The button's outer dimensions do not change when toggling isLoading
When isLoading is true, the button is functionally disabled (onPress does not fire, aria-disabled is true)
The button does NOT use the visual disabled style (no opacity reduction) when isLoading is true — it looks normal but with the spinner
small button size renders a smaller spinner (size-4), medium renders default (size-5)
Spinner is vertically and horizontally centered within the button
Spinner color works with all button color variants by inheriting currentColor
ButtonTooltip accepts and forwards isLoading to its inner Button
userStories.notes: Key files: packages/ui/src/components/Button.tsx, packages/ui/src/components/LoadingSpinner.tsx. Use position: relative on button wrapper, position: absolute on spinner overlay. Integrate isLoading into the existing tailwind-variants (tv) buttonStyle. Suppress the isDisabled visual variant when isLoading is the cause. ButtonTooltip already spreads ...rest to Button so it may just need the type updated.

userStories.title: Refactor ActiveDecisionsNotifications to use isLoading prop
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to replace the manual loading spinner logic in ActiveDecisionsNotifications with the new isLoading prop to validate the feature and simplify consumer code.
acceptanceCriteria: ActiveDecisionsNotifications uses isLoading prop on ButtonLink instead of conditional LoadingSpinner rendering
The navigatingId state is kept but the ternary {isNavigating ? <LoadingSpinner /> : t('Participate')} is replaced with isLoading={isNavigating} and children always render t('Participate')
The LoadingSpinner import is removed from ActiveDecisionsNotifications
Button size remains stable during navigation (no layout shift)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: File: apps/app/src/components/ActiveDecisionsNotifications/index.tsx. This component currently uses ButtonLink (not Button). Since the PRD scopes loading to Button and ButtonTooltip (not ButtonLink), either: (a) also add isLoading to ButtonLink for this use case, or (b) switch this to a Button with an onPress handler that navigates. Decide based on what makes sense — adding isLoading to ButtonLink is a small extension that follows the same pattern.
